blocks.text: I ...  LOOK FORWARD  TO WORKING  WITH YOU !
blocks.translation: I... LOOK FORWARD TO WORKING WITH YOU!

blocks.text: OHH ,  THIS IS  A  MAGE  WHO WILL  SUPPORT THIS  WAR .
blocks.translation: OH, THAT'S THE MAGE SUPPORTING THIS WAR.

blocks.text: THE  MAGE IS  SKILLED ,  SO DON'T  WORRY .
blocks.translation: THE MAGE IS SKILLED, SO DON'T WORRY.

blocks.text: THERE'S SOMETHING URGENT  I  NEED TO  TELL  YOU .
blocks.translation: I HAVE SOMETHING URGENT TO TELL YOU.

blocks.text: UNIN  VALED SPEAR KNIGHT Art  by  Studio
blocks.translation: UNINVALED SPEAR KNIGHT Art by Studio

blocks.text: Inus Adaptation  by  Cho  Fu - sang Professor  Cho
blocks.translation: Inus Adaptation by Cho Fu-sang Professor Cho

blocks.text: Original  by Planned  by  Lock  Media

blocks.translation: STARTING NOW, THE KNIGHTS BEGIN ARMING THEMSELVES AND PREPARING FOR BATTLE.
PREPARING FOR COMBAT AT SUCH A CRUCIAL MOMENT?

blocks.text: PREPARING  FOR COMBAT  AT  SUCH  A CRITICAL  HOUR ?

blocks.translation: TIME IS SHORT, SO I’LL GET STRAIGHT

blocks.text: THERE'S LITTLE  TIME ,  SO I'LL  GET  STRAIGHT
A  KNIGHT'S DUEL  WITH  THE  REBEL ARMY  IS  ABOUT  TO COMMENCE .
blocks.translation: A KNIGHT’S DUEL WITH THE REBEL ARMY IS ABOUT TO BEGIN.

blocks.text: WHAT ?! A  KNIGHT'S  DUEL , SO  SUDDENLY ?
blocks.translation: WHAT?! A KNIGHT’S DUEL, SO SUDDENLY?

blocks.text: I  WAS THE  ONE  WHO MADE  IT .
blocks.translation: I’M THE ONE WHO SUGGESTED IT.

blocks.text: IT  SEEMS MARQUIS  SUSPEN  HASN'T HEARD  THE  RUMORS  ABOUT YOU .  SIR  KAYN .
blocks.translation: IT SEEMS MARQUIS SUSPEN DOESN’T KNOW THE RUMORS ABOUT YOU, SIR KAYN.

blocks.text: FOR  YOUR REFERENCE ,  I  WON'T BE  PARTICIPATING  IN  THIS KNIGHT'S  DUEL .
blocks.translation: FOR THE RECORD, I WON’T PARTICIPATE IN THIS KNIGHT’S DUEL.

blocks.text: MARQUIS  SUSPEN IS  A  CELEBRATED COMMANDER ,
blocks.translation: MARQUIS SUSPEN IS A RENOWNED COMMANDER,

blocks.text: ONE  OF  THE  TOP THREE  IN  THE  EMPIRE WHEN  IT  COMES  TO  KNIGHTLY DUELS  AND  SMALL - SCALE COMBAT ...
blocks.translation: ONE OF THE EMPIRE'S TOP THREE IN KNIGHT DUELS AND SMALL BATTLES...

blocks.text: WHY  WOULD YOU  MAKE  SUCH A  PROPOSAL ?
IF  HIS MAJESTY  WERE STILL  ALIVE
blocks.translation: IF HIS MAJESTY WERE STILL ALIVE,

blocks.text: HE  COULD HAVE  CRUSHED  EVEN A  HUNDRED  KNIGHTS  BY HIMSELF
blocks.translation: HE COULD HAVE TAKEN DOWN A HUNDRED KNIGHTS ALONE.

blocks.text: WHAT  ARE YOU  TRYING TO  SAY ?
ARE  YOU  AFRAID OF  LOSING  IN  THE KNIGHT'S  DUEL ?
blocks.translation: ARE YOU AFRAID OF LOSING THIS DUEL?

blocks.text: I'M CRUSH  NOT  JUST  A  HUNDRED BUT  A  THOUSAND  OF  THEM !
blocks.translation: I’LL CRUSH NOT JUST A HUNDRED, BUT A THOUSAND!

blocks.text: OF  COURSE , I  DIDN'T  MAKE  THIS PROPOSAL  WITHOUT THINKING .
blocks.translation: OF COURSE, I DIDN’T MAKE THIS PROPOSAL WITHOUT THOUGHT.

blocks.text: DO  YOU HAVE  SOME  OTHER STRATEGY  IN  MIND ?
blocks.translation: HAVE YOU GOT ANOTHER STRATEGY IN MIND?

blocks.text: RIGHT  AFTER PROPOSING  THE  KNIGHT'S DUEL ,  I  REQUESTED  REIN- FORCEMENTS .
blocks.translation: RIGHT AFTER PROPOSING THE DUEL, I REQUESTED REINFORCEMENTS.

blocks.text: THE  TIME  IT  TAKES FOR  THEM  TO  REACH  THE SOUTH  FROM  WHEREVER THEY'RE  COMING ...
blocks.translation: THE TIME IT TAKES THEM TO REACH THE SOUTH FROM WHEREVER THEY ARE...

blocks.text: DO  YOU KNOW  WHAT THIS  IS ?
blocks.translation: DO YOU KNOW WHAT THIS IS?

blocks.text: IT'S A  WARP  STONE ! SO  YOU  FINALLY DEVELOPED  IT ?!
blocks.translation: IT’S A WARP STONE! SO YOU FINALLY DEVELOPED IT?!

blocks.text: THE  PREVIOUS TOWER  MASTER  AND CURRENT  EMPRESS OF  AVALON ,
blocks.translation: THE FORMER TOWER MASTER AND CURRENT EMPRESS OF AVALON,

blocks.text: I'VE  HEARD  THAT ISELLIN  JIN  REBREKA  IS A  GENIUS ,  BUT  EVEN  SO , THIS  IS ... !
blocks.translation: I’VE HEARD ISELLIN JIN REBREKA IS A GENIUS, BUT THIS IS...!

blocks.text: 【 令 回 · D = 8 + 区 令 / 回 · = + 8 GA
blocks.translation: ISELLIN...? THE EMPRESS HERSELF DEVELOPED THIS?!

blocks.text: ISELLIN ... ?  THE EMPRESS  HERSELF DEVELOPED  THIS ?!
IT  CAN  ONLY  BE USED  ONCE ,  AND  ONLY WITH  TEN  PEOPLE  AT THAT ...
blocks.translation: IT CAN ONLY BE USED ONCE, AND WITH ONLY TEN PEOPLE AT A TIME...

blocks.text: ARTIFACT THAT  CAN  TRANSPORT  YOU UP  TO  THREE  HUNDRED KILOMETERS .
blocks.translation: ARTIFACT THAT CAN TRANSPORT YOU UP TO THREE HUNDRED KILOMETERS.

blocks.text: IT'S  A  DISTANCE THAT  WILL  EASILY  REACH THE  CAPITAL .
blocks.translation: ENOUGH TO REACH THE CAPITAL EASILY.

blocks.text: WE'VE GRASPED  THE LEVEL  OF  ALL  ENEMY KNIGHTS .
blocks.translation: WE’VE ASSESSED THE ENEMY KNIGHTS’ SKILL LEVELS.

blocks.text: EXCEPT  FOR KAYN  AND  KYRRIA ,  THERE AREN'T  EVEN  A  HUNDRED  PEOPLE WORTHY  OF  BEING  CALLED KNIGHTS .
blocks.translation: EXCEPT FOR KAYN AND KYRRIA, THERE AREN’T EVEN A HUNDRED WORTHY KNIGHTS.

blocks.text: MOREOVER , THE  REPORT  STATES THERE  ARE  AT  MOST  FIVE OF  B - RANK  OR  HIGHER .
blocks.translation: MOREOVER, THE REPORT STATES THERE ARE AT MOST FIVE B-RANK OR HIGHER.

blocks.text: IT'S  BEEN  TWO YEARS  SINCE  THE WAR  BEGAN ,
blocks.translation: IT’S BEEN TWO YEARS SINCE THE WAR BEGAN,

blocks.text: SO  THE  SKILLED ONES  HAVE  EITHER DIED  OR  SCATTERED BY  NOW .
blocks.translation: AND THE SKILLED ONES HAVE ALL DIED OR DISPERSED.

blocks.text: THIS  IS A  BATTLE  WE  CAN NOT  LOSE .
blocks.translation: THIS IS A BATTLE WE CANNOT LOSE.

blocks.text: WE WILL  SETTLE THE  SOUTHERN WAR .
blocks.translation: WE WILL SETTLE THE SOUTHERN WAR.

blocks.text: DAYS  LATER , ON  THE  DAY  OF  THE KNIGHT'S  DUEL
blocks.translation: DAYS LATER, ON THE DAY OF THE KNIGHT’S DUEL
DO I REALLY HAVE TO WEAR THIS?

blocks.text: DO  I  REALLY HAVE  TO  WEAR THIS ?

blocks.translation: IN A KNIGHT'S DUEL, THE COMMANDER'S DEATH MEANS DEFEAT.

blocks.text: IN A  KNIGHT'S  DUEL ,  THE COMMANDER'S  DEATH MEANS  DEFEAT .
THAT'S  THE BASIC  RULE .  EVERYONE WEARS  THE  SAME  ARMOR , SO  NO  ONE  KNOWS  WHO THE  COMMANDER  IS .
blocks.translation: THAT’S THE BASIC RULE. EVERYONE WEARS THE SAME ARMOR, SO NO ONE KNOWS WHO THE COMMANDER IS.

blocks.text: IN  THAT  REGARD , THE  DON  RING  I  GAVE YOU  IS  ALSO  FORBIDDEN TO  USE .
blocks.translation: IN THAT CASE, THE DON RING I GAVE YOU IS ALSO FORBIDDEN.

blocks.text: WELL ,  IF I  USE  THE  DON  RING , A  MAGIC  ARMOUR  WILL APPEAR .
blocks.translation: USING THE DON RING MAKES A MAGIC ARMOR APPEAR.

blocks.text: IT  REALLY  STANDS OUT  TOO  MUCH .
blocks.translation: IT REALLY STANDS OUT TOO MUCH.

blocks.text: NOON ,  AND KNIGHT'S  DUEL  IS ABOUT  TO
blocks.translation: NOON, AND THE DUEL IS ABOUT TO

blocks.text: WILL  THE REINFORCEMENTS ARRIVE  ON  TIME ?
blocks.translation: WILL THE REINFORCEMENTS ARRIVE ON TIME?

blocks.text: IF  WORSE COMES  TO  WORST , COULDN'T  YOU  JUST JOIN  IN ? !!
blocks.translation: IF WORST COMES TO WORST, CAN’T YOU JUST JOIN IN?!

blocks.text: I ,  DARGO  RAIN SUSPEN ,  EMPEROR OF  SOUTH  AVALON , HAVE  ARRIVED !
blocks.translation: I, DARGO RAIN SUSPEN, EMPEROR OF SOUTH AVALON, HAVE ARRIVED!

blocks.text: SIR  KAYN , SHOULDN'T  YOU  TELL  US WHO  THE  REINFORCEMENTS ARE  SOON ?
blocks.translation: SIR KAYN, SHOULDN’T YOU INTRODUCE THE REINFORCEMENTS SOON?

blocks.text: THE REINFORCEMENTS ARE  JUST  TEN PEOPLE ...
blocks.translation: THE REINFORCEMENTS ARE ONLY TEN MEN...

blocks.text: WHEN  ARE  THE REINFORCEMENTS ACTUALLY  COMING ?
EVEN  IF THEY'RE  ALL  ROYAL KNIGHTS ,
blocks.translation: EVEN IF THEY'RE ALL ROYAL KNIGHTS,

blocks.text: IT  WILL  STILL BE  A  DIFFICULT BATTLE .
blocks.translation: IT’LL STILL BE A TOUGH FIGHT.

blocks.text: JUST  WHO ARE  THEY  THAT  WE'VE BEEN  KEPT  WAITING LIKE  THIS ?
blocks.translation: WHO EXACTLY ARE THESE REINFORCEMENTS WE’VE BEEN WAITING FOR?

blocks.text: I  BELIEVE WHEN  YOU  SEE  THE REINFORCEMENTS ,
blocks.translation: I BELIEVE WHEN YOU SEE THEM,

blocks.text: YOU'LL  BE DESPERATE  NOT TO  LOSE .
blocks.translation: YOU’LL BE DESPERATE NOT TO LOSE.

blocks.text: HASIT  BEEN ABOUT  TEN  YEARS KURRIA  SANDERS ?
blocks.translation: HAS IT BEEN ABOUT TEN YEARS, KYRRIA SANDERS?
